input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.13.2.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.13.2.4
            TITLE: vehicles must power down after leaving the course and be pushed to the fueling station or

            CONTENT:
            rule D.13.2.4: Vehicles must power down after leaving the course and be pushed to the fueling station or
D.13.2.4 Vehicles must power down after leaving the course and be pushed to the fueling station or 
data download area

final_answer: Vehicles must power down after leaving the course and be pushed to the fueling station or data download area
